name: Hierarchical Annotation v2 (115-row pilot, tree schema, relabeled)
short_description: Tree-shaped (global / subtasks-with-atomics / global_atomics) hierarchical annotation of 115 benchmark tasks from FrontierScience-Olympiad, SWE-bench Verified, Mind2Web (proxy for WorkArena++), and HumanEval (proxy for tau-bench). Same rows as the v2 source dataset; only the per-row benchmark label has been corrected to match the actual data source. Includes a 23-row LLM-as-judge spot-check.
size_description: 115 rows total; each row carries a tree-shaped hierarchy (global / subtasks-with-atomics / global_atomics) and a parallel gold_actions tree. 115 rows passed the v2 hierarchy_completeness check. 23 rows received an LLM-as-judge verdict (21 acceptable, 2 needs revision). Per-row benchmark labels: 40 FrontierScience-Olympiad, 23 SWE-bench Verified, 26 Mind2Web (proxy for WorkArena++), 26 HumanEval (proxy for tau-bench).

files.description: 115-row JSONL with the v2 tree schema and judge verdicts; benchmark labels corrected to Mind2Web and HumanEval where the original asset used the WorkArena++ and tau-bench proxy-target names.
